summary.en: AI avatars and feedback tools to scale clinical-skills training in healthcare.
summary.zh: 以 AI 虛擬人與回饋工具,大規模擴展醫療臨床技能訓練。

highlight.en: An all-in-one platform training counselors, social workers, doctors and nurses via conversational AI avatars, plus feedback and job-placement tools.
highlight.zh: 一站式平台,透過可對話的 AI 虛擬人訓練諮商師、社工、醫師與護理師,並附回饋與求職媒合工具。

summary.en: Reliable, self-improving AI inference for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業提供可靠、能自我改進的 AI 推論。

highlight.en: Maitai autocorrects faulty model output in real time and auto-fine-tunes models that learn from mistakes, giving each customer custom models that improve.
highlight.zh: Maitai 即時修正錯誤輸出並自動微調能從錯誤中學習的模型,讓每位客戶獲得隨時間更快的客製化模型。

summary.en: Foundation models that simulate the Earth, starting with weather.
summary.zh: 模擬地球的基礎模型,從天氣開始。

highlight.en: Silurian's frontier models act as an infrastructure layer for the planet, simulating wildfire risk to grid load to improve energy and insurance decisions.
highlight.zh: Silurian 的前沿模型作為地球的基礎設施層,模擬野火風險到電網負載,改善能源、保險、農業與物流決策。

summary.en: AI agents that handle client communications for clinics.
summary.zh: 為診所處理客戶溝通的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Dodo's multi-agent system autonomously runs scheduling, refills, intake and follow-ups across calls and texts, integrating with clinics to cut overhead by ~70%.
highlight.zh: Dodo 的多代理人系統自主處理排程、續方、初診與追蹤,整合診所系統,將溝通成本降低約 70%。

summary.en: AI agents built for advisory and financial services.
summary.zh: 專為顧問與金融服務打造的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Kenley applies AI agents to advisory and financial services workflows.
highlight.zh: Kenley 將 AI 代理人應用於顧問與金融服務的工作流程。

summary.en: A marketing agent for organic, paid, and AI search.
summary.zh: 涵蓋自然、付費與 AI 搜尋的行銷代理人。

highlight.en: Gauge unifies fragmented data from GA4, GSC, keywords, prompts and ads into one agent that does a whole marketing team's work and gets you into more AI answers.
highlight.zh: Gauge 將 GA4、GSC、關鍵字、提示詞與廣告等零散資料整合進單一代理人,完成整個行銷團隊的工作,並讓你出現在更多 AI 回答中。

summary.en: Open-source AI CRM with a built-in AI workforce, built on OpenClaw.
summary.zh: 建構於 OpenClaw 之上、內建 AI 員工的開源 AI CRM。

highlight.en: Dench builds AI employees that handle lead intake via voice/SMS/email, draft Gmail and Outlook replies, and run outbound sales at scale in your channels.
highlight.zh: Dench 打造常駐於溝通管道的 AI 員工,以語音、簡訊與電郵處理潛在客戶、草擬 Gmail 與 Outlook 回覆,並大規模執行外撥銷售。

summary.en: Robots that move boxes in warehouses.
summary.zh: 在倉庫中搬運箱子的機器人。

highlight.en: AutoPallet deploys swarms of small mobile robots into existing warehouses for case picking and mixed-SKU palletization at far lower cost than rival automation.
highlight.zh: AutoPallet 將小型移動機器人群部署到現有倉庫,執行箱件揀貨與混合 SKU 堆疊,成本遠低於現有自動化方案。

summary.en: Training the next generation of protein foundation models.
summary.zh: 訓練新一代蛋白質基礎模型。

highlight.en: Anthrogen trains foundation models on protein sequences and structures to generate novel molecular machines on demand, compressing evolution into hours.
highlight.zh: Anthrogen 以蛋白質序列與結構訓練基礎模型,可按需生成全新分子機器,把演化壓縮成一個下午的運算。

summary.en: AI workforce management for healthcare.
summary.zh: 為醫療業打造的 AI 人力管理。

highlight.en: Planbase gives health clinics one place for capacity planning, employee scheduling, credentialing and payroll.
highlight.zh: Planbase 讓醫療診所在單一平台完成產能規劃、員工排班、資格認證與薪資發放。

summary.en: AI sales agents for distributors and manufacturers.
summary.zh: 為經銷商與製造商打造的 AI 銷售代理人。

highlight.en: Distributors and manufacturers use Soff's sales agents to process quotes and orders and handle all communication with customers, co-workers and suppliers.
highlight.zh: 經銷商與製造商使用 Soff 的銷售代理人處理報價與訂單,並負責與客戶、同事及供應商的所有溝通。

summary.en: Open-source observability to understand why your AI agent breaks.
summary.zh: 開源可觀測性工具,協助你了解 AI 代理人為何故障。

highlight.en: Laminar lets teams trace complex agent workflows, replay and debug runs, and detect anomalies across trajectories at scale.
highlight.zh: Laminar 讓團隊追蹤複雜的代理人工作流程、重播並除錯執行過程,並在大規模軌跡中偵測異常。

summary.en: AI employees that automate enterprise knowledge work.
summary.zh: 自動化企業知識工作的 AI 員工。

highlight.en: Dataleap is an agent-first operating system that lets sales, ops and HR teams build their own AI coworkers in minutes, without engineering help.
highlight.zh: Dataleap 是以代理人為核心的作業系統,讓銷售、營運與人資團隊在數分鐘內自行打造 AI 同事,無需工程協助。

summary.en: An analytics platform for monitoring and improving AI agents.
summary.zh: 用於監控與改進 AI 代理人的分析平台。

highlight.en: Companies use Voker's SDK to monitor and improve AI agents; its founders earlier built AI products that bootstrapped an e-commerce startup to $100M in revenue.
highlight.zh: 企業使用 Voker 的 SDK 監控並改進 AI 代理人;創辦人過去打造的 AI 產品曾助一家電商新創自力成長至 1 億美元營收。

summary.en: AI-powered clinical decision support for healthcare providers.
summary.zh: 為醫療人員打造的 AI 臨床決策支援。

highlight.en: Starting with emergency physicians, Vera Health gives clinicians instant access to trustworthy, evidence-based answers 10x faster.
highlight.zh: Vera Health 從急診醫師切入,讓臨床人員即時取得可信的實證答案,速度快 10 倍。

summary.en: AI-powered product data enrichment for e-commerce.
summary.zh: 為電商打造的 AI 產品資料豐富化工具。

highlight.en: Anglera's AI agents onboard, enrich and manage product data, cutting time per product from 15 minutes to 5 seconds; founders built similar ML at Uber Eats.
highlight.zh: Anglera 的 AI 代理人協助上架、豐富並管理產品資料,將每件產品處理時間從 15 分鐘縮至 5 秒;創辦人曾在 Uber Eats 打造類似系統。

summary.en: Multimodal AI agents for video.
summary.zh: 用於影片的多模態 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Overlap's multimodal agents find specific moments, generate clips and analyze video libraries in seconds—work that takes media companies thousands of hours.
highlight.zh: Overlap 的多模態代理人能在數秒內找出特定片段、生成短片並分析影片庫,這些工作媒體公司原本需耗費數千小時。

summary.en: Run a team of parallel coding agents on your Mac.
summary.zh: 在你的 Mac 上運行一組平行的程式碼代理人。

highlight.en: Conductor runs parallel coding agents in isolated workspaces, letting you see what each is working on at a glance, then review and merge their changes.
highlight.zh: Conductor 在隔離工作區中運行平行的程式碼代理人,讓你一眼掌握各代理人進度,再審查並合併變更。

summary.en: AI platform helping industrial manufacturers win deals fast at the right price.
summary.zh: 協助工業製造商以合理價格快速贏得訂單的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Poka Labs builds AI agents that learn a chemical manufacturer's catalog, customer behavior and tribal knowledge to price, quote and win sales-rep business.
highlight.zh: Poka Labs 打造的 AI 代理人學習化學製造商的產品目錄、客戶行為與內部知識,協助業務代表定價、報價並贏得訂單。

summary.en: Generative AI molecular simulations that reproduce wet-lab results.
summary.zh: 能重現濕實驗結果的生成式 AI 分子模擬。

highlight.en: Founded by Cambridge PhDs and professors, Ångström AI constrains its simulations to obey physics, matching wet-lab accuracy 100x faster in drug development.
highlight.zh: 由劍橋博士與教授創立,Ångström AI 讓模擬遵循物理定律,在藥物開發中以快 100 倍的速度達到濕實驗的準確度。

summary.en: Automating police paperwork from body camera footage.
summary.zh: 從密錄器影像自動產生警方文書。

highlight.en: Abel turns police body camera footage into completed reports; officers spend a third of each shift writing them, so removing that could grow the force by 50%.
highlight.zh: Abel 將警用密錄器影像轉為完整報告;警員每班三分之一時間在寫報告,消除此工作等於讓警力實質增加 50%。

summary.en: Faster, more profitable background checks with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 進行更快、更高利潤的背景調查。

highlight.en: Superunit's AI voice and email agents contact employers to complete employment verifications for background-check firms, logging every step for compliance.
highlight.zh: Superunit 的 AI 語音與電郵代理人致電並去信雇主,為背景調查公司完成就業查核,並記錄每次互動以供合規。

summary.en: Unified hardware control and data processing software.
summary.zh: 整合硬體控制與資料處理的軟體。

highlight.en: Synnax unifies industrial control with sensor-data storage and automated post-processing—like LabVIEW, InfluxDB and Grafana combined into one stack.
highlight.zh: Synnax 將工業控制、感測器資料儲存與自動後處理整合於一,如同把 LabVIEW、InfluxDB 與 Grafana 合併成供硬體團隊使用的單一平台。

summary.en: A worldwide AI-powered exam-prep platform.
summary.zh: 全球性的 AI 考試準備平台。

highlight.en: Educato uses AI to generate high-quality prep content for the many exams worldwide that big players ignore, targeting the profitable middle of the market.
highlight.zh: Educato 運用 AI 為全球眾多被大廠忽略的考試生成高品質備考內容,鎖定考試分布中具獲利潛力的中段市場。

summary.en: An AI property manager for Airbnb and short-term rental hosts.
summary.zh: 為 Airbnb 與短租房東打造的 AI 物業管理員。

highlight.en: ProhostAI is built by an ex-Airbnb Staff Data Scientist and Dropbox Sr Engineer who are themselves Superhosts running nine short-term rental properties.
highlight.zh: ProhostAI 由前 Airbnb 資深資料科學家與 Dropbox 資深工程師打造,他們本身即是經營九處短租物業的超讚房東。

summary.en: AI that creates and edits professional videos.
summary.zh: 能製作與編輯專業影片的 AI。

highlight.en: VideoGen lets anyone make professional, copyright-free videos in a few clicks, serving thousands of customers from individuals to teams at Google and ByteDance.
highlight.zh: VideoGen 讓任何人只需幾次點擊就能製作專業且無版權疑慮的影片,服務從個人到 Google 與字節跳動團隊的數千名客戶。

summary.en: AI agents that handle complex billing and revenue.
summary.zh: 處理複雜計費與營收的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: LedgerUp acts as an AI billing teammate for B2B SaaS, parsing contracts, issuing invoices and collecting payments in real time while surfacing analytics.
highlight.zh: LedgerUp 是 B2B SaaS 的 AI 計費夥伴,能解析合約、開立發票並即時收款,同時提供分析。

summary.en: An at-cost lab-testing marketplace that profits when you test less.
summary.zh: 以成本價提供檢驗、你檢測越少它越賺的實驗室檢驗市集。

highlight.en: After a 60-second quiz, Mito recommends what to test and skip at published at-cost prices, with clinician-reviewed steps and an AI Concierge, for $9/mo.
highlight.zh: 完成 60 秒測驗後,Mito 以公開的成本價建議該做與該略過哪些檢測,並提供臨床醫師審閱的步驟與 AI 管家,月費 9 美元。

summary.en: "Lovable for Minecraft mods"—letting any player create mods.
summary.zh: 「Minecraft 模組版的 Lovable」,讓任何玩家都能製作模組。

highlight.en: In nine months, more Minecraft mods were made with CreativeMode than in the game's previous 17 years combined, giving every player the power of a game studio.
highlight.zh: 在九個月內,透過 CreativeMode 製作的 Minecraft 模組數量超過此遊戲過去 17 年的總和,讓每位玩家都擁有遊戲工作室般的能力。

summary.en: Powerful cross-domain quantitative forecasting models.
summary.zh: 強大的跨領域量化預測模型。

highlight.en: Zoa trains cross-domain event-forecasting engines that, like "AlphaEvolve for forecasting," automate the build-test-improve cycle with fewer human priors.
highlight.zh: Zoa 訓練跨領域事件預測引擎,如同「預測版的 AlphaEvolve」,以更少的人為先驗自動化建構─測試─改進的循環。

summary.en: AI for researchers to find, understand and write scientific documents.
summary.zh: 協助研究人員查找、理解並撰寫科學文件的 AI。

highlight.en: Anara has grown to 3M users and is approaching $10M in yearly revenue, backed by YC and the founders of GitHub and Reddit.
highlight.zh: Anara 已成長至 300 萬名使用者,年營收逼近 1,000 萬美元,並獲 YC 及 GitHub、Reddit 創辦人投資。

summary.en: AI report generation for engineering and environmental review.
summary.zh: 為工程與環境審查生成報告的 AI。

highlight.en: SchemeFlow generates construction-review reports on transportation, air quality, noise and flood risk in the US and UK, working with firms like Stantec.
highlight.zh: SchemeFlow 為美國與英國的營建審查生成交通、空氣品質、噪音與洪水風險報告,並與 Stantec、Buro Happold 等公司合作。

summary.en: A UI framework for AI agents and developers to build beautiful apps.
summary.zh: 供 AI 代理人與開發者打造精美應用的 UI 框架。

highlight.en: HeroUI makes it simple for AI agents and developers to build beautiful, accessible, production-ready interfaces for web and mobile.
highlight.zh: HeroUI 讓 AI 代理人與開發者輕鬆打造精美、無障礙且可上線的網頁與行動介面。

summary.en: Simulation software used by leading battery and automotive companies.
summary.zh: 領先電池與汽車公司採用的模擬軟體。

highlight.en: Ionworks makes battery simulations accessible to every engineer, letting them build models from their own data and run large cloud runs to replace experiments.
highlight.zh: Ionworks 讓每位工程師都能使用電池模擬,以自有資料建立模型並在雲端執行大規模模擬,取代昂貴的實驗。

summary.en: Sourcing custom parts manufactured in America, made effortless.
summary.zh: 讓在美國製造客製化零件的採購變得輕鬆。

highlight.en: Submit one RFQ and Vendra automates sourcing—matching you with US manufacturers, handling outreach and collecting quotes with no middleman markups.
highlight.zh: 提交一份詢價單,Vendra 即自動化整個採購流程,媒合美國製造商、負責聯繫並收集報價,且無中間商加價。

summary.en: AI for litigation, starting with depositions and trials.
summary.zh: 用於訴訟的 AI,從證詞與審判開始。

highlight.en: Thousands of depositions and trials run through DraftTheRecord weekly; it assists attorneys live, generates transcript drafts, and cuts transcription time 3x.
highlight.zh: 每週有數千場證詞與審判透過 DraftTheRecord 進行;它即時協助律師、生成即時逐字稿草稿,並將謄錄時間縮短為三分之一。

summary.en: A global Venmo for cross-border payments.
summary.zh: 跨境支付的全球版 Venmo。

highlight.en: Blaze is a peer-to-peer payments app using USDC for fast, cheap transfers between anyone worldwide, live in the US and Mexico on iOS and Android.
highlight.zh: Blaze 是使用 USDC 的點對點支付應用,讓全球任何兩人之間快速、低成本轉帳,已在美國與墨西哥的 iOS 與 Android 上線。

summary.en: Defect detection for manufacturing built from CAD and synthetic data.
summary.zh: 以 CAD 與合成資料打造的製造瑕疵偵測。

highlight.en: Bucket Robotics turns CAD and sample data into production-ready vision models that run on existing cameras with no manual labeling and no fragile rules.
highlight.zh: Bucket Robotics 將 CAD 與樣本資料轉為可上線的視覺模型,在現有相機上運行且無需人工標註;團隊曾在 Argo AI 開發感知系統。

summary.en: Helping hospitals identify and prevent avoidable harm using AI.
summary.zh: 協助醫院以 AI 辨識並預防可避免的傷害。

highlight.en: Pharos automatically pulls complex facts from unstructured medical records to automate mandatory quality reporting and flag where avoidable patient harm occurs.
highlight.zh: Pharos 自動從非結構化病歷擷取複雜事實,以自動化強制性品質通報,並標示可避免之病患傷害的發生處。

summary.en: Infrastructure to run and deploy code your AI wrote.
summary.zh: 運行並部署 AI 所撰寫程式碼的基礎設施。

highlight.en: Founded by two ex-Apple senior engineers, Freestyle is directly inspired by what they saw as failures of the tech they worked with at Apple.
highlight.zh: 由兩位前 Apple 資深工程師創立,Freestyle 的靈感直接來自他們在 Apple 工作時所見的技術缺陷。

summary.en: Next-generation biocides for sustainable agriculture at scale.
summary.zh: 用於大規模永續農業的新一代殺生劑。

highlight.en: ACX develops sustainable, eco-friendly biological crop protection as an alternative to chemical pesticides, aiming to raise yields while protecting farmers.
highlight.zh: ACX 開發永續、友善環境的生物作物保護方案,作為化學農藥的替代品,目標在保護環境與農民的同時提升產量。

summary.en: Deep-learning models for enzyme design.
summary.zh: 用於酵素設計的深度學習模型。

highlight.en: Ligo's models learn the principles of catalysis to design enzymes for each reaction in days not years, offering a sustainable alternative to chemical synthesis.
highlight.zh: Ligo 的模型學習催化原理,將各反應的酵素設計從數年縮至數天,為化學合成提供永續替代方案。

summary.en: Practical, general-purpose robots for repetitive industrial tasks.
summary.zh: 用於重複性工業任務的實用通用機器人。

highlight.en: Founded by three-time entrepreneurs, Ultra's zero-integration robots install in hours not weeks, quickly learn new tasks, and already earn revenue in the field.
highlight.zh: 由三度創業的團隊創立,Ultra 的零整合機器人可在數小時內安裝、快速學習新任務,且現已在現場創造營收。

summary.en: Building a nervous system for the atmosphere.
summary.zh: 為大氣打造神經系統。

highlight.en: Sorcerer's high-altitude balloon network collects 1000x more data than existing systems and is used daily by meteorologists across the US and Central America.
highlight.zh: Sorcerer 的高空氣球網路採集的資料量是現有系統的 1000 倍,氣象學家已每日用其追蹤美國與中美洲天氣。

summary.en: Building and operating underwater data centers.
summary.zh: 建造並營運水下資料中心。

highlight.en: NetworkOcean's underwater data centers cut power usage up to 30% to run GPUs more cheaply; its 1 MW capsule is being tested underwater in the SF Bay.
highlight.zh: NetworkOcean 的水下資料中心可減少多達 30% 用電以更低成本運行 GPU;其 1 兆瓦容量艙正在舊金山灣進行水下測試。

summary.en: The video context layer for AI.
summary.zh: 供 AI 使用的影片情境層。

highlight.en: Cloudglue makes it easy for AI to understand video, offering Tinycloud as an AI agent for video plus a developer API platform.
highlight.zh: Cloudglue 讓 AI 輕鬆理解影片,提供影片 AI 代理人 Tinycloud 以及開發者 API 平台。

summary.en: An AI physics simulator for AI chip design.
summary.zh: 用於 AI 晶片設計的 AI 物理模擬器。

highlight.en: DeepSim is developing what it says is the only thermal simulator for AI chip design and is validating it with Intel; its founders are Stanford EE PhDs.
highlight.zh: DeepSim 正開發其所稱唯一能滿足 AI 晶片設計需求的熱模擬器,並與 Intel 共同驗證;創辦人為三位史丹佛電機博士。

summary.en: Building the world's first AI mechanical engineer.
summary.zh: 打造全球首位 AI 機械工程師。

highlight.en: camfer is an AI CAD tool that lets engineers create parametric designs using natural language.
highlight.zh: camfer 是一款 AI CAD 工具,讓工程師以自然語言建立參數化設計。

summary.en: AI-powered site selection for renewable infrastructure at scale.
summary.zh: 以 AI 大規模協助再生能源基礎設施選址。

highlight.en: Plume lets users explore over 50 geospatial, grid and regulatory constraints in natural language, replacing fragmented data sources for energy site selection.
highlight.zh: Plume 讓使用者以自然語言處理逾 50 項地理空間、電網與法規限制,取代能源選址時零散的資料來源。

summary.en: Executable healthcare contracts.
summary.zh: 可執行的醫療合約。

highlight.en: Benchify provides an execution layer applying healthcare contract logic across audits, claims and optimization, so payments are correct and measurable.
highlight.zh: Benchify 提供執行層,將醫療合約邏輯套用於稽核、理賠處理與最佳化,使付款正確且績效可被衡量。

summary.en: AI employees for wholesalers and distributors.
summary.zh: 為批發商與經銷商打造的 AI 員工。

highlight.en: Seals automates quoting, order-taking, payments and ERP data entry for the 700k US wholesalers; its founders earlier grew AT&T Mexico to $120M ARR.
highlight.zh: Seals 為全美 70 萬家批發商自動化報價、接單、收款與 ERP 資料輸入;創辦人過去曾將 AT&T 墨西哥成長至 1.2 億美元年經常性收入。

summary.en: AI that operates quantum computers for scientific discovery.
summary.zh: 操作量子電腦以進行科學發現的 AI。

highlight.en: Conductor Quantum removes the human from quantum hardware operation, where engineers now spend days or weeks by hand just to ready a chip for two qubits.
highlight.zh: Conductor Quantum 將人類從量子硬體操作中移除;目前工程師光是讓晶片就緒以運作兩個量子位元,就需手動花費數天甚至數週。

summary.en: An AI-native canvas for creative workflows.
summary.zh: 為創意工作流程打造的 AI 原生畫布。

highlight.en: Remade builds an AI-native canvas designed for creative workflows.
highlight.zh: Remade 打造一個專為創意工作流程設計的 AI 原生畫布。

summary.en: Energy-efficient chips for AI.
summary.zh: 用於 AI 的節能晶片。

highlight.en: Zetta's highly programmable XPUs optimize dataflow per model, making them faster and far more efficient than current chips and saving data centers billions.
highlight.zh: Zetta 高度可程式化的 XPU 為每個模型最佳化資料流,比現有晶片更快、更高效,為資料中心節省數十億美元能源成本。

summary.en: Voice AI that automates drive-thru order-taking.
summary.zh: 自動化得來速接單的語音 AI。

highlight.en: Lilac automates the drive-thru order-taker for quick-service restaurants; across 200,000 US drive-thrus it can deliver roughly $100,000 of value per location.
highlight.zh: Lilac 為快餐店自動化得來速接單人員;在全美 20 萬個得來速中,每個據點可帶來約 10 萬美元價值。

summary.en: Automatically find and fix your software vulnerabilities.
summary.zh: 自動找出並修復你的軟體漏洞。

highlight.en: ZeroPath autonomously detects, verifies and submits fixes for code vulnerabilities engineers might otherwise only catch in pentests or bug bounties.
highlight.zh: ZeroPath 自主偵測、驗證並提交程式碼漏洞的修復,這些漏洞工程師原本可能只能在滲透測試或漏洞獎勵中才發現。

summary.en: A free GPS and dashcam smartphone app.
summary.zh: 免費的 GPS 與行車記錄器手機應用程式。

highlight.en: Weel turns a smartphone into an all-in-one driver co-pilot with a built-in dashcam, smart navigation, and AI features like AR navigation and ADAS.
highlight.zh: Weel 把智慧型手機變成一體式駕駛副手,內建行車記錄器、智慧導航,以及 AR 導航與 ADAS 等 AI 功能。

summary.en: Easy payments for international travelers using just a phone.
summary.zh: 讓國際旅客僅用手機就能輕鬆付款。

highlight.en: Moreta syncs with local payment networks so travelers can pay merchants like a local via QR digital wallets, starting in Asia.
highlight.zh: Moreta 與在地支付網路同步,讓旅客透過 QR 數位錢包像當地人一樣付款給商家,從亞洲起步。

summary.en: Voice AI to automate complex phone calls for healthcare providers.
summary.zh: 為醫療人員自動化複雜電話的語音 AI。

highlight.en: Hey Revia navigates complex menus, reduces hold times, and handles tedious calls like verifying provider details and securing approvals, via web and API.
highlight.zh: Hey Revia 能應對複雜選單、縮短等候時間,並處理如查核醫療提供者資料與取得核准等繁瑣電話,以網頁、行動與 API 提供。

summary.en: The open-source agentic browser.
summary.zh: 開源的代理人瀏覽器。

highlight.en: BrowserOS is an open-source agentic browser that runs AI agents locally.
highlight.zh: BrowserOS 是一款開源的代理人瀏覽器,能在本機運行 AI 代理人。

summary.en: Reliable AI for regulated operations.
summary.zh: 用於受監管作業的可靠 AI。

highlight.en: Patched executes regulated workflows in hours instead of days, with full auditability and control.
highlight.zh: Patched 在數小時而非數天內執行受監管的工作流程,並具備完整的稽核能力與控制。

summary.en: An AI affiliate network for financial companies.
summary.zh: 為金融公司打造的 AI 聯盟行銷網路。

highlight.en: Affil.ai builds AI compliance for external marketing, working with major creators to ensure their content meets credit card marketing guidelines.
highlight.zh: Affil.ai 為外部行銷打造 AI 合規,與主要創作者合作,確保其內容符合信用卡行銷規範。

summary.en: AI electromechanical process engineers for heavy industries.
summary.zh: 為重工業打造的 AI 機電製程工程師。

highlight.en: Outerport extracts structured data from PDFs and P&IDs, builds a knowledge graph, and runs agents that automate feasibility testing for LNG, HVAC and chips.
highlight.zh: Outerport 從 PDF 與管線儀錶圖擷取結構化資料、建立知識圖譜,並運行代理人,為液化天然氣、暖通空調與半導體製程自動化可行性測試。

summary.en: AI-powered workflow automation for US healthcare providers.
summary.zh: 為美國醫療提供者打造的 AI 工作流程自動化。

highlight.en: Fuse uses data-driven AI to automate US healthcare provider workflows such as patient intake, eligibility and benefits checks, and billing.
highlight.zh: Fuse 以資料驅動的 AI 自動化美國醫療提供者的工作流程,如病患初診登記、資格與給付查核以及計費。

summary.en: Making next-generation antibiotics that outpace bacterial evolution.
summary.zh: 打造能勝過細菌演化的新一代抗生素。

highlight.en: Evolvere combines co-evolutionary protein interaction data with AI to forecast bacterial mutations and make 'future-proof' antibiotics before resistance hits.
highlight.zh: Evolvere 結合協同演化的蛋白質交互作用資料與 AI,預測細菌突變並在抗藥性形成前打造「未來無虞」的抗生素。

summary.en: Configuration management for robotics.
summary.zh: 用於機器人的設定管理。

highlight.en: Miru lets robotics teams manage, version and deploy robot configurations via documented APIs and UI components, building infrastructure for physical automation.
highlight.zh: Miru 讓機器人團隊透過完善文件化的 API 與 UI 元件管理、版本控制並部署機器人設定,打造加速實體世界自動化的基礎設施。

summary.en: Omnichannel AI agents that engage leads across SMS, voice and email.
summary.zh: 跨簡訊、語音與電子郵件接觸潛在客戶的全通路 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Apten's omni-channel AI agent engages and nurtures leads across text, call, email and webchat, helping consumer-services enterprises convert more leads.
highlight.zh: Apten 的全通路 AI 代理人透過簡訊、電話、電郵與網頁聊天接觸並培養潛在客戶,協助消費性服務企業提升轉換率。

summary.en: Ship self-hosted software with Distr.
summary.zh: 以 Distr 交付自架軟體。

highlight.en: Glasskube's Distr platform eases deploying, managing and updating software in on-premises, VPC and air-gapped environments; Philip was a Kubernetes CTO.
highlight.zh: Glasskube 的 Distr 平台讓在地端、VPC 與隔離網路環境中部署、管理與更新軟體更輕鬆;共同創辦人 Philip 曾任一家 Kubernetes 公司技術長。

summary.en: ComfyUI for everyone on your team.
summary.zh: 讓團隊每個人都能使用的 ComfyUI。

highlight.en: Comfy Deploy turns ComfyUI's single-player, local-GPU experience into a shared workspace where a team's environment, models and workflows pass via a link.
highlight.zh: Comfy Deploy 將 ComfyUI 單機、需本地 GPU 的體驗轉為協作工作空間,讓團隊的環境、模型與工作流程可透過連結分享。

summary.en: Highly customizable, blazingly fast analytics for asset managers.
summary.zh: 為資產管理者打造高度客製化且極速的分析工具。

highlight.en: Bayesline's GPU-powered analytics let hedge funds build custom analytics in seconds not weeks; founders are ex-Bloomberg and ex-BlackRock veterans.
highlight.zh: Bayesline 以 GPU 驅動的分析讓避險基金在數秒而非數週內建立客製化分析;創辦人為前 Bloomberg 與前 BlackRock 老將。

summary.en: A next-generation logging and observability platform.
summary.zh: 新一代日誌與可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Invaria automatically adds actionable, structured event logs across a whole codebase, automating logging from code to storage beyond OpenTelemetry's scope.
highlight.zh: Invaria 自動在整個程式庫中加入可行動的結構化事件日誌,將從程式碼到儲存的日誌自動化,涵蓋 OpenTelemetry 理想情境之外的範圍。

summary.en: Automating home care agency operations with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 自動化居家照護機構的營運。

highlight.en: Sage is a HIPAA-compliant, AI-native communication platform that can save home care agencies over 100 minutes of busywork per prospect during client intake.
highlight.zh: Sage 是符合 HIPAA、AI 原生的溝通平台,在客戶初接洽過程中可為居家照護機構每位潛在客戶節省逾 100 分鐘的繁瑣作業。

summary.en: An AI travel planner.
summary.zh: AI 旅遊規劃助手。

highlight.en: Stardrift helps users find and book flights, hotels and activities for their vacations.
highlight.zh: Stardrift 協助使用者為假期查找並預訂機票、飯店與活動。

summary.en: AI coworkers for business automation.
summary.zh: 用於商業自動化的 AI 同事。

highlight.en: Decisional builds self-healing automation agents: describe one in natural language, and it builds, tests and runs its own workflow constantly in the background.
highlight.zh: Decisional 打造自我修復的自動化代理人:以自然語言描述代理人,它便自行建構、測試並在背景持續運行其工作流程。

summary.en: The COLD task framework for orchestration.
summary.zh: 用於任務編排的 COLD 框架。

highlight.en: Hyrex uses PostgreSQL as a durable task queue for tasks defined in Python or TypeScript, with tasks that are Controllable, Observable, Large-Scale and Durable.
highlight.zh: Hyrex 以 PostgreSQL 作為持久任務佇列,處理以 Python 或 TypeScript 定義的任務,這些任務具備可控、可觀測、大規模與持久的 COLD 特性。

summary.en: An enterprise AI agent automation platform, starting with email.
summary.zh: 從電子郵件起步的企業 AI 代理人自動化平台。

highlight.en: Proxis builds full-stack AI email agents that put the enterprise inbox on autopilot, from autonomous sales closers to customer service agents.
highlight.zh: Proxis 打造全端 AI 電子郵件代理人,讓企業收件匣自動運行,從自主成交業務到客服代理人。

summary.en: Automated AI data integrations for roll-ups.
summary.zh: 為併購整合企業打造的自動化 AI 資料整合。

highlight.en: Elevate brings AI to PE-backed roll-ups; for one customer it integrated 10 acquisitions in three months and enabled AI agents on its data warehouse.
highlight.zh: Elevate 為私募股權支持的併購整合企業導入 AI;曾為一位客戶在三個月內整合 10 件收購並在其資料倉儲上啟用 AI 代理人。

summary.en: The first AI agent for optimizing ML model inference on edge hardware.
summary.zh: 首個用於最佳化邊緣硬體上機器學習推論的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: RunLocal's AI agent automates on-device model debugging and optimization for edge hardware like Nvidia Orin and Qualcomm, used by AV and robotics leaders.
highlight.zh: RunLocal 的 AI 代理人為 Nvidia Orin 與 Qualcomm 等邊緣硬體自動化裝置端模型除錯與最佳化,獲自動駕駛、機器人與無人機領導者採用。

summary.en: The AI scientist for always-on biodefense.
summary.zh: 用於全天候生物防禦的 AI 科學家。

highlight.en: AminoAnalytica designs point-of-care molecular diagnostics for emerging biological threats in weeks, rather than the 12+ months such tests typically take.
highlight.zh: AminoAnalytica 為新興生物威脅設計即時照護分子診斷,在數週內完成,而非此類檢測通常所需的 12 個月以上。

summary.en: Unlocking revenue per employee with AI-powered headcount management.
summary.zh: 以 AI 人力管理提升每位員工帶來的營收。

highlight.en: Modus connects a company's HRIS and ATS so leaders can detect, inspect and correct workforce plans without spreadsheets; a founder scaled HashiCorp to IPO.
highlight.zh: Modus 串接公司的人資與招募系統,讓主管無需試算表即可偵測、檢視並修正人力規劃;創辦人曾將 HashiCorp 從 100 名員工帶到上市。

summary.en: 100x faster scientific evidence synthesis.
summary.zh: 快 100 倍的科學證據彙整。

highlight.en: The Synthesis Company reviews 20,000+ papers in weeks with 98% accuracy for partners at Stanford, Harvard and Johns Hopkins; its team are ex-DSPy contributors.
highlight.zh: The Synthesis Company 為史丹佛、哈佛與約翰霍普金斯的夥伴在數週內以 98% 準確度審閱逾 20,000 篇論文;團隊為前 DSPy 核心貢獻者。

summary.en: An open-source applied AI lab building next-gen devtools.
summary.zh: 打造新一代開發者工具的開源應用 AI 實驗室。

highlight.en: Manaflow is an open-source applied AI lab and the creator of cmux, the open-source terminal for coding agents.
highlight.zh: Manaflow 是一個開源應用 AI 實驗室,也是程式碼代理人開源終端機 cmux 的開發者。

summary.en: Data for biomedical AI.
summary.zh: 供生醫 AI 使用的資料。

highlight.en: Aluna works with health organizations to build curated datasets and evals for health AI, currently focused on oncology.
highlight.zh: Aluna 與醫療組織合作,為健康 AI 建立精選資料集與評測,目前聚焦於腫瘤學。

summary.en: Engineering microbes for miners to unlock billions in trapped metal.
summary.zh: 為礦業者改造微生物,以釋放數十億美元的被困金屬。

highlight.en: 1849 bio engineers microbes for biomining at ~$1/ton vs ~$7/ton conventionally, targeting ~$800B of copper trapped in waste that current methods can't extract.
highlight.zh: 1849 bio 改造微生物進行生物採礦,每噸約 1 美元、遠低於傳統的約 7 美元,鎖定現有方法無法獲利開採、困於廢料中約 8,000 億美元的銅。

summary.en: A reliable AI frontend engineer.
summary.zh: 可靠的 AI 前端工程師。

highlight.en: MagiCode is an AI frontend agent that writes, reviews and rigorously tests code before pushing a PR, letting busy teams offload complex, repetitive tasks.
highlight.zh: MagiCode 是一個 AI 前端代理人,會在提交 PR 前撰寫、審查並嚴格測試程式碼,協助繁忙的前端團隊卸下複雜且重複的任務。

summary.en: AI-powered CAD software that speeds up hardware development.
summary.zh: 加速硬體開發的 AI CAD 軟體。

highlight.en: Hestus automates the tedious, repetitive tasks that bog engineers down between idea and final design, freeing them for the creative part of CAD work.
highlight.zh: Hestus 自動化工程師從構想到最終設計之間繁瑣重複的任務,讓他們專注於 CAD 工作的創意部分。

summary.en: A Java-native multi-agent AI operating system for enterprise.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的 Java 原生多代理人 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: Redouble's Silverlake maps agentic concepts onto enterprise primitives in Java's own language, security model and infrastructure, empowering 12M Java engineers.
highlight.zh: Redouble 的 Silverlake 將代理人概念對應到 Java 自身語言、安全模型與基礎設施中既有的企業要素,賦能 1,200 萬名 Java 工程師。

summary.en: An AI-powered spreadsheet for billing automation.
summary.zh: 用於計費自動化的 AI 試算表。

highlight.en: Dimely's AI agents extract details from Order Forms, MSAs and POs, flag discrepancies and sync to NetSuite and Stripe; used by unicorns like Checkr and Airbyte.
highlight.zh: Dimely 的 AI 代理人從訂單表、主服務協議與採購單擷取細節、標示差異並同步至 NetSuite 與 Stripe;Checkr 與 Airbyte 等獨角獸皆有採用。

summary.en: Agents for quantitative research and financial data science.
summary.zh: 用於量化研究與金融資料科學的代理人。

highlight.en: Sharpe bundles petabytes of market data with fast infrastructure to take traders from idea to profit in minutes; it helped a top-5 quant firm find $10M+ fast.
highlight.zh: Sharpe 結合 PB 級市場資料與高效能基礎設施,讓交易者在數分鐘內從構想走向獲利;曾助一家前五大量化公司在數小時內找出逾 1,000 萬美元利潤。

summary.en: "Datadog for industrial robots."
summary.zh: 「工業機器人版的 Datadog」。

highlight.en: Autumn Labs offers a developer-friendly platform that integrates with robotic stations for full traceability, live data monitoring and secure data transport.
highlight.zh: Autumn Labs 提供對開發者友善的平台,與機器人工作站整合,提供完整可追溯性、即時資料監控與安全資料傳輸。
